arm_raises.name: Arm Raises
arm_raises.instructions: Stand straight with your arms at your sides. Raise both arms forward until they reach shoulder height. Slowly lower them back to the starting position and repeat.
common_mistakes: Swinging the arms instead of controlled movement

side_arm_raise.name: Side Arm Raise
side_arm_raise.instructions: Stand upright with arms by your sides. Lift both arms out to the sides until they reach shoulder height. Lower them slowly back to the starting position.

triceps_dips.name: Triceps Dips
triceps_dips.instructions: Sit on the edge of a chair or bench and place your hands beside your hips. Slide your hips off the edge and bend your elbows to lower your body. Push back up to the starting position.

arm_circles_clockwise.name: Arm Circles Clockwise
arm_circles_clockwise.instructions: Stand with arms extended out to the sides. Move your arms in small circles in a clockwise direction while keeping them straight.
common_mistakes: Moving the torso instead of arms

arm_circles_counterclockwise.name: Arm Circles Counterclockwise
arm_circles_counterclockwise.instructions: Stand with arms extended at shoulder height. Rotate your arms in small circles in the counterclockwise direction.
common_mistakes: Dropping the arms below shoulder level

diamond_push_ups.name: Diamond Push Ups
diamond_push_ups.instructions: Start in a push-up position with your hands close together forming a diamond shape. Lower your chest toward your hands. Push back up to the starting position.

jumping_jacks.name: Jumping Jacks
jumping_jacks.instructions: Stand with feet together and arms at your sides. Jump while spreading your legs and raising your arms overhead. Jump back to the starting position.

chest_press_pulse.name: Chest Press Pulse
chest_press_pulse.instructions: Stand or sit with arms extended forward at chest level. Press your palms together and pulse them slightly inward repeatedly.

leg_barbell_curl_left.name: Leg Barbell Curl Left
leg_barbell_curl_left.instructions: Stand upright and simulate a barbell curl with your left arm while lifting the opposite knee slightly. Lower the arm and repeat.

leg_barbell_curl_right.name: Leg Barbell Curl Right
leg_barbell_curl_right.instructions: Stand straight and perform a curl motion with your right arm while lifting the opposite knee slightly. Return to start and repeat.

diagonal_plank.name: Diagonal Plank
diagonal_plank.instructions: Start in a plank position with hands under shoulders. Extend one arm forward while keeping your body stable. Hold briefly and return to plank.

punches.name: Punches
punches.instructions: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Extend one arm forward in a punching motion and return quickly. Alternate arms in a steady rhythm.

push_ups.name: Push Ups
push_ups.instructions: Start in a plank position with hands under shoulders. Lower your body until your chest is near the floor. Push back up to the starting position.

inchworms.name: Inchworms
inchworms.instructions: Stand upright and bend forward to place your hands on the floor. Walk your hands forward into a plank position. Walk them back toward your feet and stand up.

wall_push_ups.name: Wall Push Ups
wall_push_ups.instructions: Stand facing a wall and place your hands on it at shoulder height. Bend your elbows to bring your chest closer to the wall. Push back to the starting position.
common_mistakes: Standing too close to the wall

triceps_stretch_left.name: Triceps Stretch Left
triceps_stretch_left.instructions: Raise your left arm overhead and bend the elbow so your hand reaches your upper back. Use your other hand to gently push the elbow back.
common_mistakes: Pulling too hard on the elbow

triceps_stretch_right.name: Triceps Stretch Right
triceps_stretch_right.instructions: Raise your right arm overhead and bend the elbow so your hand reaches your upper back. Gently press the elbow with the opposite hand.

standing_biceps_stretch_left.name: Standing Biceps Stretch Left
standing_biceps_stretch_left.instructions: Stand straight and extend your left arm behind you, palm facing away. Gently rotate your shoulder to stretch the biceps.

standing_biceps_stretch_right.name: Standing Biceps Stretch Right
standing_biceps_stretch_right.instructions: Stand straight and extend your right arm behind you with palm facing away. Rotate shoulder gently to stretch biceps.

floor_tricep_dips.name: Floor Tricep Dips
floor_tricep_dips.instructions: Sit on the floor, place hands behind hips, fingers facing forward. Lift hips and bend elbows to lower body, then push back up.

military_push_ups.name: Military Push Ups
military_push_ups.instructions: Start in push-up position with hands close to your body. Lower chest toward floor, elbows tucked. Push back up.

alternating_hooks.name: Alternating Hooks
alternating_hooks.instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Punch one arm across your body, then the other in alternating rhythm.

push_up_and_rotation.name: Push Up And Rotation
push_up_and_rotation.instructions: Perform a push-up, then rotate body and lift one arm toward ceiling. Alternate sides with each push-up.

skipping_without_rope.name: Skipping Without Rope
skipping_without_rope.instructions: Stand tall and simulate rope skipping motion with arms. Jump lightly on the balls of your feet.

burpees.name: Burpees
burpees.instructions: Stand upright, squat down and place hands on floor. Jump feet back to plank, perform push-up, jump feet forward, then jump up.

arm_scissors.name: Arm Scissors
arm_scissors.instructions: Extend your arms straight in front of you at shoulder height. Open arms wide to the sides and cross them back in front like scissors. Repeat rhythmically.
common_mistakes: Not keeping arms at shoulder height

arm_curls_crunch_left.name: Arm Curls Crunch Left
arm_curls_crunch_left.instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent. Hold a weight in your left hand and perform a bicep curl while crunching your upper body slightly. Lower and repeat.

arm_curls_crunch_right.name: Arm Curls Crunch Right
arm_curls_crunch_right.instructions: Lie on your back and perform a bicep curl with the right arm while slightly crunching your upper body. Lower and repeat.

shoulder_gators.name: Shoulder Gators
shoulder_gators.instructions: Stand upright and mimic a swimming motion with your arms in small circles. Move shoulders and arms smoothly.

doorway_curls_left.name: Doorway Curls Left
doorway_curls_left.instructions: Stand in a doorway and place your left hand on the frame. Step back slightly and perform a bicep curl using the doorframe for resistance.

doorway_curls_right.name: Doorway Curls Right
doorway_curls_right.instructions: Place your right hand on the doorway frame and step back slightly. Curl your arm using the frame for resistance. Return and repeat.

modified_push_up_low_hold.name: Modified Push Up Low Hold
modified_push_up_low_hold.instructions: Start in a modified push-up position on knees. Lower body halfway to floor and hold for a few seconds. Push back up and repeat.
